3186250.name: Zombie Murder 3
3186250.description:
Zombie Murder is back! Take control of a powerful steel mech and smash crowds of zombies to pieces with driving heavy metal! Zombie Murder 3 is a new part of the Top Down Shooter game with a bunch of levels, bosses and upgrades. The game is back after many years and this time it goes 3D! The upgrade option has reached a new level: now you have as many as 25 skills that can be developed to enhance the robot's abilities. As well as permanent skills: Dash and Red Barrier, which allow you to dodge enemy attacks or completely absorb enemy shots, converting them into health and energy. Four difficulty levels: from the simplest, which everyone should be able to handle, to the insanely difficult one, where you will have to masterfully control the mech and wisely use all the resources of your robot.

- 3D Top Down Shooter! Take control of a steel Mech and destroy zombies!
- 25 skills to upgrade.
- 4 difficulty levels.
- Various monsters and bosses!
- Dynamic gameplay to the fiery Heavy Metal!

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
